stemHtml: The use of an anti-skid system, as compared to an inoperative (or no) system will stop the aeroplane, for all runway conditions, in a…

options.a: shorter distance. Aircraft, therefore, need a reduced landing mass to ensure stopping within the runway limits.
options.b: longer distance. This allows for operations with increased landing mass, using the remaining landing distance.
options.c: longer distance. Aircraft, therefore, needs a reduced landing mass to ensure stopping within the runway limits.
options.d: shorter distance. This allows for operations with increased landing mass, using the remaining landing distance.
